notes: Paper Source wraps openags/paper-search-mcp as an external dependency.

Paper Source also exposes optional grok-search-rs through plugin MCP self-registration; the launcher reads grok_search_mcp.command, args, and env_file/env_files from the user-level Paper Source runtime.json.
Paper Source discovery calls search_papers and preserves source coverage telemetry in run reports, including source capabilities, provider readiness, source routing, and provider gaps when available.
Paper Source demotes unstable sources such as Google Scholar by default and records missing provider env, such as Unpaywall email, as provider gaps rather than paper unavailability.

Paper Source acquisition tries download_with_fallback first; if no direct PDF URL exists and OA fallback finds no PDF, it records manual-download-required with DOI/publisher links instead of running weak fallback loops.
Paper Source verifies downloaded PDF identity with lightweight DOI/title checks before MinerU; clear mismatches are quarantined under _paper_source/quarantine/papers/<slug>/paper.pdf.

When a direct PDF candidate exists, Paper Source may continue to source-native MCP, CLI, or direct URL fallback; Sci-Hub is disabled unless PAPER_SOURCE_PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_USE_SCIHUB is explicitly enabled.

After successful acquisition, Paper Source may call read_<source>_paper or CLI read to write a non-authoritative retrieval preview sidecar at paper-search-read-preview.txt; this is not replacing MinerU.

Use PAPER_SOURCE_PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_COMMAND and PAPER_SOURCE_PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ARGS to override the paper-search stdio server command. Use PAPER_SOURCE_GROK_SEARCH_MCP_COMMAND and PAPER_SOURCE_GROK_SEARCH_MCP_ARGS to override the grok-search-rs stdio server command. Use PAPER_SOURCE_PAPER_SEARCH_COMMAND for the CLI fallback.

doctor --json reports paper_search_provider_readiness so missing Unpaywall email, CORE key, Semantic Scholar key, Google Scholar proxy, DOAJ key, or Zenodo token can be treated as recall/fallback risk rather than hidden failure.
